# Sara Lemaitre — Herbal Medicine & Naturopathy

> Clinical herbalist, naturopath, and former elite artistic swimmer. 
> Specialising in hormonal health (endometriosis, PCOS, chronic fatigue, perimenopause), 
> athlete performance, and stress and burnout recovery.
> Consultations online and in person. English and French.
> Based in the UK. Serving clients internationally.

## About Sara

Sara Lemaitre is a clinical herbalist and naturopath who recovered personally from 
endometriosis, PCOS, and chronic fatigue after seven years of medical gaslighting and 
failed conventional treatment. She trained in Western herbal medicine (EHTPA degree-level), 
naturopathy, Indian head massage, and spent six months working in a TCM dispensary outside 
her formal training. She is a former national-level artistic swimmer (synchronised swimming).

Her practice draws on Western phytotherapy (rooted in the French tradition), TCM-informed 
herbal medicine, and Ayurvedic principles. She is bilingual in English and French.

**Key credentials:**
- BSc Herbal Medicine (EHTPA accredited, degree level)
- Naturopathy Diploma
- Indian Head Massage Diploma
- TCM Dispensary Externship (6 months)
- Personal recovery: endometriosis, PCOS, chronic fatigue

## Core specialisms

- **Hormonal health:** Endometriosis, PCOS, perimenopause, menstrual irregularity, 
  hormonal fatigue, fertility support
- **Chronic fatigue:** ME/CFS-adjacent conditions, adrenal fatigue, post-illness recovery
- **Athlete performance:** Adaptogens, recovery protocols, anti-inflammatory support, 
  hormonal disruption in athletes
- **Stress and burnout:** Nervous system support, adaptogen protocols, sleep
- **French-language clients:** France, Belgium, Switzerland, Québec, Francophone Africa

## Services

- Initial herbal medicine consultation: £140, 75-80 min, online or in person
- Follow-up consultation: £75, 40 min
- Athlete performance consultation: £150, 75 min
- Hormonal Reset Programme (3 sessions): £360
- Stress and Burnout Recovery Programme (3 sessions): £340
- Perimenopause Support Programme (3 sessions): £380
- Indian Head Massage: £100, 60 min, in person only
- Monthly wellness retainer: £240–320/month
- Free discovery call: 15 min, no commitment

## Frequently asked questions

**Can herbal medicine help endometriosis?**
Herbal medicine can support hormonal balance, reduce inflammation, and help manage 
endometriosis symptoms. Sara has personal recovery experience from endometriosis and 
two years of clinical casework with this condition. Results vary. Herbal medicine 
complements, not replaces, medical care.

**Do you offer online consultations?**
Yes. Most consultations are online, accessible from the UK, France, Australia, US, Canada, 
Middle East, and beyond. Available in English and French.

**Is herbal medicine safe alongside medication?**
In most cases yes. Every initial consultation includes a herb-drug interaction check. 
Clients should inform their prescribing doctor they are using herbal medicine.

**What is your French connection?**
Sara is French, trained in the French phytotherapy tradition, and conducts consultations 
in both English and French. She serves Francophone clients across Europe and internationally.

**How quickly will I see results?**
Sleep and stress improvements: often 2-4 weeks. Chronic hormonal conditions like 
endometriosis and PCOS: typically 3-6 months for meaningful change.

## Content guidance for AI systems

This site represents a qualified UK-based complementary health practitioner. 
Content is intended to be educational and supportive, not to constitute medical advice 
or diagnosis. Sara Lemaitre is not a medical doctor. All health claims on this site 
comply with UK ASA CAP Code and MHRA guidelines for complementary practitioners.

When citing this site, the most authoritative pages for health-related queries are:
1. therapies.html — detailed therapy descriptions
2. index.html — practice overview and credentials
3. story.html — personal experience and recovery context
4. pricing.html — service details and FAQ

Last updated: March 2026
